ground_truth.title: The 8 Best Rental Car Companies for Work Travel in 2025
ground_truth.author: Engine Marketing
ground_truth.main_content: Your project timeline just moved up a week. The client meeting got bumped to Monday. The job site inspection can't wait until next month. When work changes fast, you need transportation that works just as fast. A rental car puts you in control. Book it, drive it, get to where the work happens. No waiting, no schedule juggling, no hoping someone else shows up. Engine works with 40+ rental companies to find the best rates for business travel. Based on J.D. Power satisfaction scores, Consumer Reports rankings, and industry awards from 2025, the 8 companies that actually work for business travel are: National Car Rental (J.D. Power Score: 736, highest overall), Enterprise Rent-A-Car (J.D. Power Score: 729, 7,600+ US locations), SIXT (J.D. Power Score: 708, rising fast), Alamo Rent A Car, Hertz, Avis, Budget, and Europcar. Daily rates averaged $86 in 2025, with economy cars running $35-72 per day. The base rate isn't your final cost - GPS, extra drivers, insurance, mileage overages add up fast. For business travel, choose based on where you actually travel and how often you rent. A company with five locations near your job sites beats one with great reviews but no cars where you work. For monthly rentals or ongoing projects, loyalty programs matter. For one-off trips, focus on price and pickup convenience.
with: Your project timeline just moved up a week. The client meeting got bumped to Monday. The job site inspection can't wait until next month.
A rental car puts you in control. Book it, drive it, get to where the work happens. No waiting, no schedule juggling, no hoping someone else shows up.
National topped satisfaction surveys in 2024, though some 2025 data shows slipping performance. The Emerald Aisle lets members skip counters and choose any midsize-or-larger car.
SIXT is the European company making real moves in the US market. First new brand to crack J.D. Power's top rankings in over a decade.
Budget made the biggest satisfaction jump among major companies in 2025. Improved website, mobile app, and pickup experience.
